title: Orange (disambiguation)
content:
'''Orange''' can refer to the following:

[[File:RoutineValor-FC.jpg|thumb|right|210px|The orange [[Armor/Legends|armor]] of [[Cloning/Legends|Clone]] [[Clone trooper commander|Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]].]]

*The [[Color/Legends|color]] '''orange'''.
*[[Orange District]], a district on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*[[Orange Lady]], a bar on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]
*[[Orange Panthacs]], a platoon of [[B2 super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]
